title: BLOCK 3 FINAL: Numbers & symbols mastery
description: Block 3 final exam — 35 WPM with all letters, digits, symbols
text: On 25 May 2026, Sam Smith (sam@team.co) closed Deal #142 worth $12,500 (+15% from Q1). "Outstanding!" said the CEO. Next target: 200% growth by Dec 2026. Email: ceo@company.com #milestone

tips.text: 220 characters - the longest run yet, and the closing exam of Block 3. Settle in and keep the rhythm even.
This is how business actually reads: figures, names, a quote, a deadline. Type it like you mean it.

character_tips.anna: Block 3, finished. Any content the day hands you, you can now type. The blocks ahead build speed.
character_tips.maxim: End of the foundation. What follows is speed and refinement, nothing you can't reach.

character_tips.klavochka: The foundation is laid, and it's solid. Now we let the hands move quicker.
